nav.followingMcp.title: GUI is following an MCP-issued view intent. Click any tab to continue manually.
welcome.title: ProjectMind
welcome.hint.browser: Enter an absolute path on the ProjectMind host, or open one from the LLM CLI.
welcome.hint.tauri: Or use the projectmind-mcp server with your favourite LLM CLI — see the README.
welcome.empty: No view selected. Pick Files or Diagrams above, or send an MCP intent.
browserMode.dropHint.unsupported: The browser cannot access local file paths. Use the desktop app to drag-and-drop folders.
files.placeholder: Select a file on the left.
files.filter.md.title: Browse markdown files in this repository
files.filter.html.title: Browse HTML files and snippets in this repository
files.package.label: package
modules.heading: Modules
diagram.hint: Click a node to drill into it
tour.loading.hint: Fetching steps from the MCP server.
tour.empty.title: No active tour
tour.empty.hint: Ask your AI to start a tour via walkthrough_start.
tour.waiting.title: The AI is preparing an answer
tour.waiting.followup: As soon as the AI calls walkthrough_start again, this view jumps to the follow-up tour automatically.
tour.finished.title: Tour completed
tour.feedback.label: What should the AI describe in more detail? (optional)
tour.narration.label: AI explanation
